hero.title: VoiceStick
hero.lead: A compact voice stick based on M5Stack StickS3. It connects to your Mac over BLE, uses the Doubao speech foundation model for recognition, and turns real-time feedback into text at your cursor.
hero.imageAlt: VoiceStick portable voice input device based on M5Stack StickS3

ble.title: Low-power BLE
ble.body: Pair the StickS3 in your hand over Bluetooth Low Energy. It is wireless, efficient, and ready to stay on your desk or travel with your laptop.

model.title: Doubao speech foundation model
model.body: VoiceStick uses the Doubao speech foundation model for recognition, making spoken Chinese, longer sentences, and everyday phrasing feel fast to turn into editable text.

feedback.title: Live text feedback
feedback.body: Recognition appears as live feedback on screen, then the final text is confirmed before it is inserted into the current input field.

story.title: Pick it up to speak. Put it down to keep writing.
story.body: VoiceStick turns M5Stack StickS3 into a dedicated voice input button. Keep it near your keyboard, slip it into a pocket, or carry it with your Mac. Hold to talk, and the recognized text comes back to your cursor.

download.title: Download the latest release
download.body: After installing the macOS app, future versions can be offered through the built-in update checker.
